description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing on a circular plinth, with one arm raised and the other holding a rolled scroll. Beside the figure is a detailed architectural model of a church or cathedral, complete with twin spires and intricate facade details. The figure appears to be gesturing toward the model, possibly indicating its significance or involvement in its creation. The base is textured to resemble stone or granite, and the entire composition is unified on a tiled platform. The sculpture is rendered in a metallic, dark gray finish, giving it a monumental and dignified appearance. The overall form and posture suggest a commemorative or historical theme, likely honoring an architect or significant contributor to the depicted building.
description: A robed human figure stands beside a detailed model of a church with twin spires, both mounted on a circular stone-like base. The figure gestures toward the church, suggesting a commemorative or historical theme.
description_view_0: The front view shows the robed figure with one arm raised and the scroll in the other hand, standing next to the church model with its twin spires clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the side of the figure and the depth of the church model, with the spires and architectural details prominent.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the figure and the rounded back of the church model, showing the figure's posture and the scroll tucked under the arm.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the church model's twin spires and the figure's outstretched arm, with the figure partially turned away.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with architectural model of a church or cathedral
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a tiled platform, suggesting an outdoor urban or plaza setting.
